sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n109917" key="u(yhlo/pous" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑψηλό-πους</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, neut. <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">πουν</itype>, gen. <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ποδος</itype>, <sense id="n109917.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">high-footed,</tr_> of beds, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antyll.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:9:14:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.14.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
